inputs.label: Resistance per unit length (R)
inputs.businessContext: Series resistance per unit length of the transmission line

inputs.label: Conductance per unit length (G)
inputs.businessContext: Shunt conductance per unit length (use 0 for ideal lossless line)

formulas.alpha: const omega = 2 * Math.PI * f; const A = r*g - omega*omega*l*c; const B = omega*(r*c + l*g); const magZY = Math.sqrt(A*A + B*B); const theta = Math.atan2(B, A); Math.sqrt(magZY) * Math.cos(theta/2);
formulas.beta: const omega = 2 * Math.PI * f; const A = r*g - omega*omega*l*c; const B = omega*(r*c + l*g); const magZY = Math.sqrt(A*A + B*B); const theta = Math.atan2(B, A); Math.sqrt(magZY) * Math.sin(theta/2);
formulas.magnitude: const omega = 2 * Math.PI * f; const A = r*g - omega*omega*l*c; const B = omega*(r*c + l*g); Math.sqrt(Math.sqrt(A*A + B*B));
formulas.alpha_dB: const omega = 2 * Math.PI * f; const A = r*g - omega*omega*l*c; const B = omega*(r*c + l*g); const magZY = Math.sqrt(A*A + B*B); const theta = Math.atan2(B, A); const alpha = Math.sqrt(magZY) * Math.cos(theta/2); alpha * 8.685889638065035;
